creator: mikhail.maximov@gmail.com
text:
There are still two-and-a-half solutions:

1) package maintainer reverts the change on a basis that no Python 3.6 will be supported; or

2) all Salt installations should be amended with manual installation of pip and 'contextvars' Python package; or

3) package should become dependent on a newly created, just-for-the-case package `py39-contextvars` that installs 'contextvars' Python package

I should remind again that Python 3.7+ will rely on its internal implementation even if contextvars package is installed.
